jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Vedanta
jsonLd.description:
Vedanta is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Vedanta:
Vedanta is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedanta!
